name: Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add salt and sugar to the yeast mixture.
3. Blend in flour and knead dough until smooth, about 7 to 8 minutes.
4. Cover and let dough rise until double in bulk.
5. Punch down the dough.
6. Cut dough into small pieces and roll into ropes.
7. Twist ropes into pretzel shapes and place on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Brush pretzels with beaten egg using a pastry brush.
9. Sprinkle coarse salt on top of each pretzel.
10. Allow pretzels to rise until almost double in bulk.
11. Bake at 425 degrees F. for 10 to 15 minutes or until browned.
12. Best if eaten immediately. If not, store in an airtight container.
Makes 12 6-inch pretzels.
